The '''Government Mound''' was a hill in the center of [[Abridon/Legends|Abridon's]] [[Abridon capital city|capital city]]. On the hill's peak sat the [[Abridon Government Center]], which served as the capitol of Abridon. Government Mound was an extremely picturesque site with a commanding view of the city. It was surrounded by gardens to the northwest and a river which curved along the cliff faces which made up the south and east sides of the hill.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
